ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Continued To Jan-07-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to JAN-07-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge Cynthia M. Lee; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
